examples: But his egomania was largely justified.
Some easterners recently quit the party, complaining of his "vindictive egomania".
Worse still, I was never able to distinguish his optimism from plain egomania; I would not have been surprised to hear him announce that he had invented a better tree.
Yet for all the stories of greed and egomania, Karajan was a master conductor.
But egomania is one of the more powerful forces that have shaped world history.
